steps.note: Grounded 12 data-source contracts against publishers (9 tier A, 3 tier B). Includes China: nbs (marginals_only), pboc (marginals_only), safe (mixed - outward portfolio assets bilateral, IIP marginals). Each China contract states bilateral-vs-marginals with fetched-page evidence; absent bilateral series recorded as UNVERIFIED-by-absence. Human gate = PR review (web). DP2 not begun.
